title: DB_CHANGESET
description: Database lane artifact. Produced by DB Agent. Consumed by Worker (applies migrations) and Auditor (validates). ADR-021.

changeset_id.description: Unique identifier for this DB changeset.

work_packet_id.description: References the WORK_PACKET that initiated this DB lane.

db_system.description: Target database system. Must match WORK_PACKET.db_system.

db_targets.description: Database objects affected. Must be subset of WORK_PACKET.db_targets.

file.description: Migration file path relative to migrations/ directory.

direction.description: Migration direction. Forward applies changes. Rollback reverses them.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this migration does.

migrations.description: Ordered list of migration files to apply. Must be sequential. No gaps.

schema_diff_artifact.description: Path to schema diff artifact showing before/after state of affected tables.

migrations.description: Rollback migration files in reverse order.

rollback_plan.description: Mandatory rollback plan. Auditor fails if missing.

step.description: Validation step description or SQL query.

expected.description: Expected result. Must be deterministically verifiable.

validation_steps.description: Post-migration validation steps. Each must be mechanically verifiable.

risk_class.description: Risk classification. HIGH requires human approval before Worker applies. MED requires rollback plan review. LOW proceeds automatically.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of DB changeset creation.
